title: The Preventive Care Deficit: How GCC Health Systems Are Buying Tomorrow's Crisis Today
deck: Gulf governments have built world-class hospitals. They forgot to stop people needing them.
excerpt: Billions invested in curative infrastructure while preventive care remains underfunded — and the chronic disease burden is accelerating.

title: Abu Dhabi's Quiet Capital War — And Why It Is Already Winning
deck: While the world debated which financial centre would replace London, Abu Dhabi simply made itself indispensable to everyone.
excerpt: Abu Dhabi has executed one of the most deliberate capital attraction strategies in history — and most of its competitors still haven't noticed.

title: AI in Arab Healthcare: The Gap Between the Announcement and the Ward
deck: Every Gulf health ministry has an AI strategy. Almost none of them have an AI implementation.
excerpt: The GCC is spending heavily on healthcare AI. Most of it is going nowhere — and the reasons are structural, not technical.
